meaning: adj.野蛮的,未开化的,凶猛的,残忍的vt.用暴力对付n.原始的人,粗鲁的人
examples: She had been badly hurt in what police described as 'a savage attack'.
The book contrasts modern civilization with the ideal of the noble savage who lived in harmony with nature.
"Can you handle that?" Savage asked, eyeballing Cameron.
Mr. HOFFMAN: (As Jon Savage) It's the only time I can get away for research.
